cards.title: Facebook Launches AI Companion App for Creators
cards.body: Facebook is testing a new AI companion app with select creators featuring its recently launched AI creator assistant. The tool is built specifically to help creators manage and develop their content.

cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Custom Chip Named Jalapeño
cards.body: OpenAI revealed its first custom processor built by Broadcom, designed specifically for the company's inference systems. The chip represents a strategic move toward hardware independence.

cards.title: Figma Updates with AI-Powered Code Layers
cards.body: Figma's latest update adds code layers, animation support, and shaders alongside new AI-powered custom plug-in creation. The features expand design-to-development workflows.

cards.title: Agility Robotics Plans $2.5B SPAC IPO
cards.body: Humanoid robotics startup Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC, expecting to raise $620 million in proceeds. The deal values the Oregon State spinout at $2.5 billion.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Tag Integrates Slack Workspace
cards.body: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, an always-on AI teammate for Slack that learns organizational context and workflows. The feature represents a strategic push to embed Claude deeper into enterprise operations.

cards.title: MoEngage Deploys Millions of AI Agent Assistants
cards.body: India's MoEngage announced an all-cash deal giving it technology to assign personalized AI agents to individual customers. The move positions the company at the forefront of agent-based marketing.

cards.title: Fika Jobs Raises $4M for AI Interview Platform
cards.body: Stockholm-based Fika Jobs secured $4 million to build a video-first hiring platform combining AI interview agents with short-form profiles. The tool merges LinkedIn-style networking with TikTok-style content.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Open Source Bug-Patching Initiative
cards.body: OpenAI announced a new initiative using AI to help the open source community identify and patch vulnerabilities. The program aims to strengthen security across open source ecosystems.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M After Nvidia Non-Acquisition
cards.body: AI chipmaker Groq confirmed a $650 million funding round and is re-staffing after Nvidia's $20 billion non-acqui-hire deal. The company is expanding its neocloud business and hiring new executives.

cards.title: Google DeepMind Invests $75M in AI Filmmaking
cards.body: Google DeepMind and A24 are partnering to build AI filmmaking tools with a $75 million commitment. The collaboration aims to transform content creation in Hollywood.

cards.title: Amazon Tests Alexa+ AI Assistant in India
cards.body: Amazon is expanding its conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India with Hindi-language support. The rollout invites users to test the new assistant in their local language.

cards.title: SpaceX Signs $150M Monthly AI Compute Deal
cards.body: Reflection AI, an open source lab, will pay SpaceX $150 million monthly for access to Nvidia's latest GB300 chips through 2029. The deal grants immediate compute access from SpaceX's Memphis data center.

cards.title: Agentic AI Systems Operating in Continuous Loops
cards.body: The AI industry is adopting 'loopy' agentic systems that authorize swarms of agents to work continuously in the background. This evolution takes autonomous AI capabilities to the next level.

cards.title: Trump Administration Cracks Down on Anthropic
cards.body: The Trump administration has initiated new moves against AI company Anthropic. The actions raise questions about regulatory pressures shaping the AI ecosystem.

cards.title: Nvidia's Water Solution Misses AI's Main Problem
cards.body: Nvidia announced a new cooling system reducing data center water use, but the initiative ignores AI's largest water consumption from fossil fuel power plants. The gap highlights infrastructure challenges ahead.

cards.title: Facebook Launches AI Companion App for Creators
cards.body: Facebook is testing a new AI companion app built with its recently launched AI creator assistant. The tool is currently available to select creators on the platform.

cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Custom Chip Built by Broadcom
cards.body: OpenAI introduced Jalapeño, a custom processor designed specifically for its inference systems. The chip was built in partnership with Broadcom.

cards.title: Figma Adds AI Features and Code Layers
cards.body: Figma's latest update includes new code layers, motion and shader support, and AI-powered custom plug-ins. The features aim to streamline design workflows.

cards.title: MoEngage Bets on AI Agents for Marketing
cards.body: India's MoEngage acquired technology that assigns individual AI agents to customers. The all-cash deal positions the company for the future of personalized marketing.

cards.title: Anthropic Brings Claude to Slack with New Tag
cards.body: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, an always-on AI teammate integrated into Slack. The feature captures organizational context and institutional knowledge for enterprises.

cards.title: Fika Jobs Raises $4M for AI Interview Platform
cards.body: Stockholm-based Fika Jobs secured $4 million to build a video-first hiring platform with AI agents. The tool combines short-form video profiles with automated interviews.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Open Source Bug-Patching Initiative
cards.body: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community identify and fix vulnerabilities. The initiative aims to strengthen security across open source projects.

cards.title: AI World Getting 'Loopy' with Continuous Agents
cards.body: The latest AI trend involves authorizing swarms of agents to work continuously in the background. This agentic AI approach takes automation to a new level.

cards.title: Groq Confirms $650M Raise After Nvidia Deal
cards.body: AI chipmaker Groq raised $650 million and is expanding its neocloud business. The company is also hiring new executives after Nvidia's controversial not-acqui-hire deal.

cards.title: Google DeepMind Invests $75M in AI Filmmaking
cards.body: Google DeepMind partnered with A24 to build AI filmmaking tools. The $75 million bet positions AI as central to Hollywood's future production process.

cards.title: Amazon Tests Alexa+ in India with Hindi
cards.body: Amazon is expanding its Alexa+ conversational AI assistant to India with Hindi language support. Users in the country can now test the new AI assistant.

cards.title: SpaceX Inks $150M Monthly Compute Deal
cards.body: Reflection AI will pay SpaceX $150 million monthly for access to Nvidia's GB300 AI chips through 2029. The deal provides cutting-edge compute resources for open source AI development.

cards.title: Stripe and Anthropic Fund Respiratory Research
cards.body: Stripe, Anthropic, and OpenAI are backing efforts to develop prevention for respiratory infections. The initiative aims to move beyond current cold prevention limitations.

cards.title: Web Data Infrastructure Layer Emerges for AI
cards.body: Enterprises need structured data at scale to maximize AI potential, but much information remains blocked or unstructured. A new data infrastructure layer is emerging to solve this challenge.

cards.title: Oracle's 21,000 Layoffs Fuel AI Investments
cards.body: Oracle announced 21,000 layoffs to fund its debt-fueled AI expansion strategy. The company is prioritizing AI capabilities despite workforce reductions.
